name: AsertaLoans
description_short: AsertaLoans is a Dallas-based mortgage broker and lender offering purchase, refinance, FHA, VA, jumbo, and specialized loan programs with local market expertise.
description_long:
AsertaLoans operates as a mortgage broker and direct lender based in Dallas, TX, positioned at 3232 McKinney Avenue, Suite 500. The company serves homebuyers and businesses throughout Dallas and surrounding areas, with a focus on the local DFW housing market. They emphasize understanding the unique needs of Dallas homebuyers in a growing market characterized by strong job growth and increasing demand.

The company offers a broad range of mortgage products including conventional loans, FHA loans, VA loans, jumbo loans, purchase loans, refinance loans, cash-out refinances, ITIN loans for non-citizens, bank statement loans for self-employed borrowers, HELOC loans, and land loans. They provide both broker services (connecting borrowers with loan programs) and direct lending capabilities. Their application process is conducted online, with most pre-approvals reportedly completed within hours. They maintain a learning center with educational content about Texas mortgage processes and market conditions.

AsertaLoans distinguishes itself through local Dallas market expertise, competitive rates across multiple loan types, and specialized programs uncommon among standard lenders—particularly ITIN loans for undocumented workers and bank statement loans for self-employed borrowers. The company emphasizes speed (online application, fast pre-approval) and accessibility (flexible qualification options across credit profiles). Their website highlights serving diverse borrower types from first-time homebuyers to those refinancing existing mortgages.

The main caveat is that as a mortgage broker/lender, AsertaLoans serves a fundamentally different consumer need than other CreditDoc categories—this is long-term home financing, not emergency cash, credit repair, or debt relief. Borrowers must meet mortgage underwriting standards, and the 15-30 day underwriting timeline is standard for mortgages but differs significantly from fast-cash products. No specific information about rates, fees, or third-party reviews is provided beyond the mention of Google Reviews.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers ITIN loans specifically designed for undocumented workers without Social Security numbers
Provides bank statement loans for self-employed borrowers who lack traditional pay stubs
Fast pre-approval process with most approvals completed within hours
Local Dallas market expertise and understanding of DFW housing conditions
Dual broker/lender model provides access to multiple loan programs and direct lending
Comprehensive loan product range including VA, FHA, jumbo, HELOC, and land loans
Online application process for convenience and accessibility
cons: Standard 15-30 day underwriting timeline means this is not a fast-funding product
No specific rate information provided on website to compare competitiveness
Only one physical location mentioned (Dallas); geographic service area beyond DFW unclear
Requires meeting standard mortgage underwriting standards; not accessible to all borrowers
No third-party review data, ratings, or complaint history provided on website
best_for: First-time homebuyers in the Dallas-Fort Worth area seeking pre-approval and purchase guidance
Self-employed or gig workers who need bank statement loans instead of traditional paystub verification
Undocumented immigrants seeking ITIN loans to achieve homeownership
Existing homeowners looking to refinance or access home equity through HELOC products
diagnosis: AsertaLoans is best for Dallas-area homebuyers and homeowners seeking traditional mortgage financing, particularly those with non-standard income documentation or immigration status. The main caveat is that mortgage lending is fundamentally different from other CreditDoc categories—this is long-term home financing requiring 15-30 day underwriting, not emergency cash or credit repair solutions.
services: FHA loans with low down payment options
VA loans for eligible veterans and service members
ITIN loans for non-citizens without Social Security numbers
Bank statement loans for self-employed borrowers
HELOC (home equity line of credit) loans
Land loans for vacant property purchases
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
meta_description: Dallas-based mortgage broker offering purchase, refinance, FHA, VA, jumbo, and specialized loan programs.
